name: Hedge Recebiveis Fundo De Investimento Imobiliario
summary: HREC11 is a Brazilian real estate investment fund (FII) focused on investing in real estate receivables (CRIs). The fund aims to provide investors with income and capital appreciation through exposure to a diversified portfolio of CRIs backed by various real estate assets. HREC11 aims to generate consistent returns through strategic allocation to high-quality CRIs in Brazil.
